{{CargoOrgan
|name=Sophist's Tongue
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10877
|idx=84
|description=A tongue classified SSS-level dangerous. Any researcher exposed to it hears scathing, logic-twisting insults until they cough blood and perish. Even sealed in a soundproof box, it still echoes faintly: "I've never seen such shamelessness!"
|skill=
|hp=1530
|def=280
|atk=203
|rush=208
|gene1=RUSH Ignore DEF +3%
|gene2=Each round, {race} ATK +60
|gene3=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -6%
|gene4=Snail Arena, enemy CRIT - 15%
|gene5=Snail Arena, Lifesteal +30%
|gene7=Snail Arena, enemy CRIT - 15% (Awakened)
|}}
